body:
Hey Amara, following up on our conversation from last week about the [Halfway Capital](org/halfway-capital) deal flow you mentioned in the climate infrastructure space. I've been doing some digging on our end and think there could be a real overlap with a couple of founders we've been tracking who are building at the intersection of grid modernization and AI-driven demand forecasting. Would love to set up a call this week or next to compare notes — no agenda, just a loose conversation to see if there's anything worth co-investing on or at least cross-referring. Let me know what works for your schedule.

Ravi
